header_tagline: Rank what you want to see. Let the simulator run itself.
status_loaded: Loaded {count} movies. Set your priorities below.
status_load_failed: Couldn't load the planner. Check the console for details.
availability_note: Every day defaults to fully available. Uncheck a day to skip it entirely — its times below stay as shown, they just won't be used.
upload_priorities_bad_columns: Expected a "Title,Priority" CSV — columns not found.
upload_priorities_applied_with_unmatched: Applied {matched} priorities ({unmatched} title(s) in the file weren't found in this year's list).
upload_priorities_error: Couldn't read that file. Check the console for details.
objective_note: Linear just adds up priorities. Quadratic and Exponential favor landing your single highest-priority picks over a larger pile of lower-priority ones — Exponential much more aggressively than Quadratic. Either way, the total/min/mean/max shown below are always plain (Linear) sums, even when a different objective picked the schedule.
capped_priority_warning: {count} movie(s) have a priority above {cap}; for the exponential objective, priorities above {cap} are treated as exactly {cap} (this doesn't change the priority value itself, just how the exponential objective weighs it).
results_summary_objective_note: (picked by the {objective} objective, not necessarily the highest of these)
highlight_official_pdf: Highlight picked movies on official planning
pdf_export_error: Couldn't build the PDF. Check the console for details.
pdf_highlight_summary: Marked {matched}/{total} picked movies on the official planning.
warnings_note: these back-to-back picks leave you almost no time to move.
schedule_empty: Nothing scheduled yet — set a few priorities above and build again.
discarded_note: Highest priority first. Bump a priority and rebuild to try to save it.
discarded_empty: Nothing left behind — everything you ranked made it in.
discarded_reason_outscored: {date} {time} — free, but outscored by the rest of the schedule
error_generic: Something went wrong while building the schedule. Check the console for details.
footer_before_link: Runs entirely in your browser via
footer_after_link: Nothing you enter leaves your machine.
